mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_document WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY issue_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_document WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_document WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_document WHERE deleted = 0 AND doc_type = #{docType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permit_document ( doc_name, doc_type, category, related_permit, issue_date, retention_years, file_location, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{docName}, #{docType}, #{category,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{relatedPermit,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{issueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{retentionYears}5, #{fileLocation,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_document SET doc_name = #{docName}, doc_type = #{docType}, category = #{category,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, related_permit = #{relatedPermit,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, issue_date = #{issueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, retention_years = #{retentionYears}, file_location = #{fileLocation,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_permit_document SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
